overview: Villain Arc is a luxury dark-academic criminal psychology learning tool for college students. It features curated criminal case dossiers, a theory matcher engine, SM-2 spaced-repetition flashcards, and a personal study journal — all wrapped in Celine-inspired editorial minimalism, fully on-chain via Internet Computer.
features: Case File Explorer — landmark criminal case dossiers with DSM profiles, theories, and editorial summaries
Theory Matcher — backend rule engine ranks criminology theories against your crime scenario with confidence scores
Flashcard Quiz — SM-2 spaced repetition across terms, theorists, disorders, cases, and research methods
Study Journal — rich-text research log with tagging, search, and automatic degree milestone tracker
Internet Identity authentication — fully on-chain, no external cloud dependencies
Celine-inspired editorial design — Playfair Display, DM Sans, JetBrains Mono, 1px borders, no radius
